entries.text: {table:gm/npc/host-intro} If you share your troubles, they know someone offering: {table:gm/npc/host-assistance}. That contact is currently {table:gm/npc/host-role}, {table:gm/npc/host-location}. Relationship to your host: {table:gm/npc/host-relationship}. Expect something like “{table:gm/npc/host-attitude}” when you reach out.

{table:gm/npc/host-intro} If you share your troubles, they know someone offering: {table:gm/npc/host-assistance}. That contact is currently {table:gm/npc/host-role}, {table:gm/npc/host-location}. Relationship to your host: {table:gm/npc/host-relationship}. Expect something like “{table:gm/npc/host-attitude}” when you reach out. Unfortunately: {table:gm/npc/host-twist}
